title: verbascum densifolium
intro: Verbascum densifolium, also known as dense-leaved mullein, is a biennial herb plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are found in its leaves and flowers. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum densifolium have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and its health benefits also extend to soothing skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
